meta.title: Verified space industry calendar
meta.sourceNote: Double-checked public organizer pages. Excludes unverified years, private dinners, and side events without a public date page.

events.title: Space Investors Forum
events.notes: NSSA forum linking national-security space leaders, ventures, and private capital. Highest-signal July presence for fundraising and dual-use conversations.

events.title: Humans to the Moon and Mars Summit
events.notes: Explore Mars H2M2 at Rice. Strong for Artemis and exploration narrative; secondary to investor forum if travel conflicts on July 21.

events.title: SATShow 2027 speaker deadline
events.notes: Call for Speakers closes 3 Aug 2026 for SATShow Week 8–11 Mar 2027 in Washington, DC. Accepted speakers receive a complimentary conference pass.

events.title: Small Satellite Conference
events.notes: 40th Annual SmallSat. Core industry venue for constellation operators, onboard compute, and ground-segment partners.

events.title: SDL Technical Workshop
events.notes: Immediate SmallSat add-on. Attendance restricted to US citizens with appropriate clearance; seating limited.

events.title: World Space Business Week
events.priority: Only with meetings or subsidized access
events.notes: Reference European business week. Worth the trip only with pre-booked meetings or subsidized access given cost and density of competing September events.

events.title: ESA Industry Space Days
events.notes: ESA SME-office networking with pre-arranged 1:1s. High value for European institutional and industry partnerships.

events.title: Texas Space Summit
events.notes: Inaugural statewide Texas business summit mixing DoD, NASA, primes, investors, and supply chain.

events.title: NL Space Week
events.notes: Broad Dutch space week. Monitor the detailed program before committing travel; pair with ESA ISD if already in-country.

events.title: Small Payload Ride Share Symposium
events.notes: SPRSA symposium at NASA Ames. High for access-to-orbit and small-payload orchestration conversations.

events.title: International Astronautical Congress
events.notes: Global congress. Prioritize only with planned meetings or accepted paper/session plan.

events.title: ASCEND 2027 submission deadline
events.notes: AIAA ASCEND content deadline for the May 2027 apex event in Washington, DC. Call for content opens 21 Jul 2026.

events.title: International Security Space Forum
events.notes: NSSA allied security-space forum. Consider if dual-use and allied-gov relationships are active priorities.

events.title: Silicon Valley Space Week
events.notes: Satellite Innovation + MilSat Symposium under one roof. Must-attend for Bay Area operator, investor, and defense density.

events.title: Space & Satellites USA
events.notes: Reuters Events senior summit capped around 250 leaders. High for post-midterm policy and 2027 budget conversations.

events.title: Space Tech Expo Europe
events.notes: European hardware and supply-chain expo. High if pursuing manufacturing or ground-segment hardware partners.

events.title: SmallSat Symposium
events.notes: Definitive SmallSat business conference returning to the Computer History Museum for 2027.

events.title: ASCENDxTexas
events.venue: South Shore Harbour Resort and Conference Center
events.notes: AIAA ASCENDx regional summit feeding into ASCEND 2027. Strong for Texas ecosystem and off-world commercial strategy.

events.title: SATShow Week
events.notes: Largest early-year satellite week. Registration opens August 2026; speaker path closes 3 Aug 2026.

events.title: ASCEND
events.notes: AIAA ASCEND apex event. Content deadline 8 Oct 2026.

events.title: Space Tech Expo USA
events.notes: US counterpart to the European hardware expo. Track for supply-chain and manufacturing partners.

events.title: International Astronautical Congress 2027
events.notes: IAC 2027 in Poznań. Plan paper and meeting strategy after IAC 2026 outcomes.
